q4.rationale: Portfolio is upstream FinRL-Trading's own top-25% ML-selected subset of a 30-name scoped NASDAQ universe (PANW, INTC, INTU, LRCX, ADI, AMD, META, CSCO), allocated by a real A2C policy (upstream FinRL's own DRLAgent wrapping stable_baselines3.A2C, trained live for 3000 timesteps on real yfinance history through 2026-07-06). Upstream's own slow-regime detector (adaptive_rotation.market_regime, real weekly ^GSPC/^VIX data) reports 'risk_on' (risk_score=0), contributing a 0% cash floor overlay on top of the DRL policy's own 0.0% cash allocation. None of the caller-requested tickers were in the ML-selected top-25% set this cycle; the full ML-selected set is used instead (see adapters/finrl_x_adapter.py header, 'Q4 universe').
